item.title: We should be no more interested in understanding people that took trips to concentration camps and did nothing than understandin...
item.description:
We should be no more interested in understanding people that took trips to concentration camps and did nothing than understanding those that visited Israel on a paid for propaganda tour and did nothing



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: The right wing of a movment often tells the truth, that liberals deny
item.description:
The right wing of a movment often tells the truth, that liberals deny. They just embrace the brutality of that truth, rather than what a humane position every time woudl do and oppose it.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is obviously racist but it also tells us something very important about the American voter base which is that the biggest t...
item.description:
This is obviously racist but it also tells us something very important about the American voter base which is that the biggest tree that was promoted abroad to justify imperial wars will always come back and that is why the first primary aim of a leftist project is not just to respond to that bigotry but undermine the system of imperialism that systematises and necessitate it



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: America is agaisnt theocracy’s… until they can suporot one agaisnt china
item.description:
America is agaisnt theocracy’s… until they can suporot one agaisnt china. The US is agaisnt monarchy’s… until they can support one against Iran or in Saudi or the UAE. Don’t ever let them tell u who the good guys are.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: “Hey yall I’m like the most evil person one could conceive of painting the prisoners we have starved and attacked for decades as...
item.description:
“Hey yall I’m like the most evil person one could conceive of painting the prisoners we have starved and attacked for decades as the problem”
